report_name: 'TrojPix' Attack Exfiltrates Data from Air-Gapped Systems by Turning Video Cables into Antennas

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Physical Medium
attack_patterns.description: The TrojPix malware exfiltrates data from air-gapped systems by modulating pixels on the screen to generate electromagnetic emissions from the video cable, which acts as an unintentional antenna.

attack_patterns.name: Replication Through Removable Media
attack_patterns.description: Identified as a potential initial access vector to install the TrojPix malware onto a target air-gapped system, such as via a compromised USB drive.

malware.name: TrojPix
malware.description: A novel malware developed for a research project that exfiltrates data from air-gapped systems by encoding it into imperceptible, high-frequency modulations of pixels displayed on the screen. This causes the computer's video cable to emit decodable electromagnetic signals.

identities.name: Shandong University
identities.description: The research institution whose researchers developed and demonstrated the TrojPix data exfiltration attack.

identities.name: Military and intelligence agencies
identities.description: A class of organizations identified as potential high-value targets for the TrojPix data exfiltration technique due to their reliance on air-gapped systems.

identities.name: Critical infrastructure operators
identities.description: A class of organizations identified as potential high-value targets for the TrojPix data exfiltration technique due to their reliance on air-gapped systems.

identities.name: Financial institutions
identities.description: A class of organizations identified as potential high-value targets for the TrojPix data exfiltration technique due to their reliance on air-gapped systems.

infrastructure.name: TrojPix Data Reception Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: A remote receiver setup, consisting of a software-defined radio (SDR) dongle and a laptop, used to capture and decode the electromagnetic emissions from the target's video cable to reconstruct exfiltrated data.
